title: Waxed Icons Indicator
description: Resource pack with the different waxed indicator.
body:
Brings back the icon from [dhyces's mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/waxed-icons) to [Waxed Icons](https://modrinth.com/mod/waxedicons).

In 1.1 version of the mod this icon was added as "alternative", so there is no reason to support this resourcepack.
